title: Creating Connections: How Salesforce India Made 2024 Unforgettable
author: Salesforce Careers

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.text: As the year draws to a close, we’re pausing to reflect on what makes Salesforce truly special—the people who bring our values to life and the vibrant culture that binds us together. This year, Salesforce India saw multiple activities and events that celebrated this unique mix of connection, community, and creativity. Here’s a look at the moments that made this year one to remember:

sections.heading: Laughter and Learning: Salesforce Adventure Club
sections.text: The Salesforce India offices came alive with giggles and smiles as over 1,200 children and parents joined us for the Salesforce Adventure Club event. Our annual ‘Bring Your Kids to Work’ event, this day was designed as an in-person experience to honor 25 years of Salesforce history and celebrate our birthday with junior Trailblazers across India. For those who couldn’t make it to the office, the Salesforce Augmented Reality app enabled kids across India to join the fun from their homes, ensuring the celebration was as inclusive as it was entertaining.From fun DIY activities like face painting and balloon twisting to workshops on cookie painting and foil art, the event had enough and more entertainment for both the little ones and their parents. The highlight was a dance booth where the kids could showcase their latest moves, and when they needed a breather, they could retreat to cozy lounge rooms and sensory-friendly areas filled with coloring books and crayons.Amid all the excitement and laughter, the spirit of giving back remained at the heart of the day. Families took part in our volunteering activity, with kids and parents coming together to create eco-friendly paper bags. Their collective efforts helped clock an inspiring 300 volunteer hours — a true reflection of Salesforce’s commitment to making a difference.One parent said it best:“No other workplace prioritizes these experiences like Salesforce does. This is one of the reasons why I am proud to be at Salesforce.”

sections.heading: Marking 25 Years with Values and Purpose
sections.text: As Salesforce turned 25 in March, the India team celebrated in true Trailblazer fashion — with a mix of joy and impact. Alongside global swag distributions for 41,000 employees, we collaborated with a small, women-driven organization to distribute handcrafted cookies and do-it-yourself cookie kits to employees. Not only were these treats delightful, but they also symbolized something deeper — a commitment to supporting local communities and amplifying the voices of women-led businesses.

sections.heading: Diwali with a Difference: Spreading Kindness
sections.text: At Salesforce, festivals are more than celebrations — they’re opportunities to give back. This Diwali, Salesforce India came together to make the festival brighter for others, creating 2,500 sweet boxes that were distributed to 25 NGOs to share with their local communities. It wasn’t just about the sweets. It was about the communal energy in the room as over 1,200 participants came together to create something meaningful. By the end, employees clocked384 volunteer hoursand delivered smiles to countless faces.

sections.heading: Pioneering a New Chapter: AI Learning Day
sections.text: October brought a first for Salesforce India:AI Learning Day. Building on the company’s unwavering focus on continuous learning, the day was dedicated to upskilling, coming together to demystify AI, and exploring the technology’s potential. Employees completed hands-on trails, built their first AI agents, and deepened their understanding of Salesforce’s internal AI tools. As people worked together to expand their knowledge of AI, there was a collective sense of excitement about stepping into the future together.

sections.heading: Step Up for Change: Salesforce Run 2024
sections.text: When it comes to making an impact, Salesforce Run 2024 proved that every step counts — literally. This year’s flagship fundraising event brought together 5,800 runners from five cities: Gurgaon, Jaipur, Mumbai, Hyderabad, and Bangalore. From Salesforce employees and their families and friends to Futureforce interns, customers and Trailblazer Community members, the energy was electric, and the impact was undeniable. Together, we covered over 4,49,000 kilometers and contributed a whopping 71,000 volunteer hours. But the real victory? Raising an incredible₹2 croreto create lasting impact. Thanks to the funds raised, we’re helping10,000 high school girlsto explore career opportunities with the Antarang Foundation, opening doors to brighter futures. At the same time, we’re giving back to the planet byplanting40,000 saplingsin Hyderabad’s new biodiversity park, a green initiative in partnership with Green Yatra.Beyond the numbers, Salesforce Run 2024 captured the heart of our One India Salesforce spirit—a community that believes in well-being, togetherness, and creating meaningful change.

sections.heading: Why It Matters
sections.text: Every Salesforce event is more than just a gathering. It’s a reflection of what we stand for. Whether it’s the joy of spending time with family, the satisfaction of giving back to the community, or the thrill of exploring how AI will shape tomorrow, each thoughtful experience is designed to bring us closer, inspire growth and make new connections.As we step into a new year, we’re committed to keeping this One India Salesforce spirit alive — building a workplace where togetherness, learning, and purpose thrive. Here’s to another year of creating meaningful memories and making a difference, together!Want to experience Salesforce culture firsthand? Explore ouropen rolesand start your journey with us today.

existing_ctas.body: At Salesforce, we’re not just shaping the future. We’re turning big ideas into breakthroughs. Want to join the #1 AI CRM that’s leading the digital labor revolution? Explore our open roles today!

raw_html:
As the year draws to a close, we’re pausing to reflect on what makes Salesforce truly special—the people who bring our values to life and the vibrant culture that binds us together. This year, Salesforce India saw multiple activities and events that celebrated this unique mix of connection, community, and creativity. Here’s a look at the moments that made this year one to remember:

Blaze your trail to Salesforce!

At Salesforce, we’re not just shaping the future. We’re turning big ideas into breakthroughs. Want to join the #1 AI CRM that’s leading the digital labor revolution? Explore our open roles today!

Apply now

Laughter and Learning: Salesforce Adventure Club

The Salesforce India offices came alive with giggles and smiles as over 1,200 children and parents joined us for the Salesforce Adventure Club event. Our annual ‘Bring Your Kids to Work’ event, this day was designed as an in-person experience to honor 25 years of Salesforce history and celebrate our birthday with junior Trailblazers across India. For those who couldn’t make it to the office, the Salesforce Augmented Reality app enabled kids across India to join the fun from their homes, ensuring the celebration was as inclusive as it was entertaining.

From fun DIY activities like face painting and balloon twisting to workshops on cookie painting and foil art, the event had enough and more entertainment for both the little ones and their parents. The highlight was a dance booth where the kids could showcase their latest moves, and when they needed a breather, they could retreat to cozy lounge rooms and sensory-friendly areas filled with coloring books and crayons.

Amid all the excitement and laughter, the spirit of giving back remained at the heart of the day. Families took part in our volunteering activity, with kids and parents coming together to create eco-friendly paper bags. Their collective efforts helped clock an inspiring 300 volunteer hours — a true reflection of Salesforce’s commitment to making a difference.

One parent said it best: “No other workplace prioritizes these experiences like Salesforce does. This is one of the reasons why I am proud to be at Salesforce.”

Marking 25 Years with Values and Purpose

As Salesforce turned 25 in March, the India team celebrated in true Trailblazer fashion — with a mix of joy and impact. Alongside global swag distributions for 41,000 employees, we collaborated with a small, women-driven organization to distribute handcrafted cookies and do-it-yourself cookie kits to employees. Not only were these treats delightful, but they also symbolized something deeper — a commitment to supporting local communities and amplifying the voices of women-led businesses.

Diwali with a Difference: Spreading Kindness

At Salesforce, festivals are more than celebrations — they’re opportunities to give back. This Diwali, Salesforce India came together to make the festival brighter for others, creating 2,500 sweet boxes that were distributed to 25 NGOs to share with their local communities.

It wasn’t just about the sweets. It was about the communal energy in the room as over 1,200 participants came together to create something meaningful. By the end, employees clocked 384 volunteer hours and delivered smiles to countless faces.

Pioneering a New Chapter: AI Learning Day

October brought a first for Salesforce India: AI Learning Day. Building on the company’s unwavering focus on continuous learning, the day was dedicated to upskilling, coming together to demystify AI, and exploring the technology’s potential. Employees completed hands-on trails, built their first AI agents, and deepened their understanding of Salesforce’s internal AI tools. As people worked together to expand their knowledge of AI, there was a collective sense of excitement about stepping into the future together.

Step Up for Change: Salesforce Run 2024

When it comes to making an impact, Salesforce Run 2024 proved that every step counts — literally. This

 year’s flagship fundraising event brought together 5,800 runners from five cities: Gurgaon, Jaipur, Mumbai, Hyderabad, and Bangalore. From Salesforce employees and their families and friends to Futureforce interns, customers and Trailblazer Community members, the energy was electric, and the impact was undeniable.

Together, we covered over 4,49,000 kilometers and contributed a whopping 71,000 volunteer hours. But the real victory? Raising an incredible ₹2 crore to create lasting impact.

Thanks to the funds raised, we’re helping 10,000 high school girls to explore career opportunities with the Antarang Foundation, opening doors to brighter futures. At the same time, we’re giving back to the planet by planting 40,000 saplings in Hyderabad’s new biodiversity park, a green initiative in partnership with Green Yatra.Beyond the numbers, Salesforce Run 2024 captured the heart of our One India Salesforce spirit—a community that believes in well-being, togetherness, and creating meaningful change.

Why It Matters

Every Salesforce event is more than just a gathering. It’s a reflection of what we stand for. Whether it’s the joy of spending time with family, the satisfaction of giving back to the community, or the thrill of exploring how AI will shape tomorrow, each thoughtful experience is designed to bring us closer, inspire growth and make new connections.

As we step into a new year, we’re committed to keeping this One India Salesforce spirit alive — building a workplace where togetherness, learning, and purpose thrive. Here’s to another year of creating meaningful memories and making a difference, together!

Want to experience Salesforce culture firsthand? Explore our open roles and start your journey with us today.

We can’t wait to meet you!

Join our Talent Community and be the first to know about open roles, career tips, events happening near you, and much more.
